name: Conaway Golf Performance | Top 100 Coach In America
about: Conaway Golf Performance is a specialized golf training studio offering high-performance coaching for golfers of all abilities. The facility utilizes cutting-edge technology and individualized coaching programs to improve swing mechanics, strengthen physical abilities, and enhance mental performance. Membership packages provide access to private coaching, practice sessions, and fitness training, with options tailored to beginners, intermediate players, and advanced competitors.
why_golfers_like_it: Individualized coaching programs tailored to specific skill levels and goals
Access to premium technology including launch monitors and simulators
Comprehensive membership options with flexible packages for long-term development
Focus on holistic improvement including swing mechanics, fitness, and mental performance
Proven results with students achieving lower scores and tournament victories

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf equipment, including clubs and appropriate attire, for all lessons and simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink to the facility?
faq.answer: No outside food or beverages are mentioned as being permitted. The facility focuses on coaching and training without on-site dining options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Exact timing for 18 holes isn't specified, but typical simulator sessions vary based on the package booked, from 30-minute lessons to full-hour practice sessions.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Conaway Golf Performance offers specific junior golf programs and private junior coaching, making it suitable for young golfers.
